metadata.title: Azure stack storage differences and considerations | Microsoft Docs
metadata.description: Understand the differences between Azure stack storage and Azure storage, along with Azure Stack deployment considerations.

metadata.title: Azure stack storage differences and considerations | Microsoft Docs
metadata.description: Understand the differences between Azure stack storage and Azure storage, along with Azure Stack deployment considerations.
metadata.author: mattbriggs
metadata.ms.author: mabrigg

content.markdown: *Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit*
content.text: *Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit*

content.markdown: *Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit*
content.text: Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit

content.markdown: Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit
content.text: Applies to: Azure Stack integrated systems and Azure Stack Development Kit

content.markdown: Azure Stack storage is the set of storage cloud services in Microsoft Azure Stack. Azure Stack storage provides blob, table, queue, and account management functionality with Azure-consistent semantics.
content.text: Azure Stack storage is the set of storage cloud services in Microsoft Azure Stack. Azure Stack storage provides blob, table, queue, and account management functionality with Azure-consistent semantics.

content.markdown: Azure Stack storage is the set of storage cloud services in Microsoft Azure Stack. Azure Stack storage provides blob, table, queue, and account management functionality with Azure-consistent semantics.
content.text: Azure Stack storage is the set of storage cloud services in Microsoft Azure Stack. Azure Stack storage provides blob, table, queue, and account management functionality with Azure-consistent semantics.

content.markdown: This article summarizes the known Azure Stack Storage differences from Azure Storage services. It also lists things to consider when you deploy Azure Stack. To learn about high-level differences between global Azure and Azure Stack, see the [Key considerations](azure-stack-considerations.md) article.
content.text: This article summarizes the known Azure Stack Storage differences from Azure Storage services. It also lists things to consider when you deploy Azure Stack. To learn about high-level differences between global Azure and Azure Stack, see the [Key considerations](azure-stack-considerations.md) article.

content.markdown: This article summarizes the known Azure Stack Storage differences from Azure Storage services. It also lists things to consider when you deploy Azure Stack. To learn about high-level differences between global Azure and Azure Stack, see the
content.text: This article summarizes the known Azure Stack Storage differences from Azure Storage services. It also lists things to consider when you deploy Azure Stack. To learn about high-level differences between global Azure and Azure Stack, see the
Azure storage service encryption for data at Rest

content.markdown: Azure storage service encryption for data at Rest
content.text: Azure storage service encryption for data at Rest
256-bit AES encryption. Support encryption using customer-managed keys in Key Vault.

content.markdown: 256-bit AES encryption. Support encryption using customer-managed keys in Key Vault.
content.text: 256-bit AES encryption. Support encryption using customer-managed keys in Key Vault.
BitLocker 128-bit AES encryption. Encryption using customer-managed keys isn't supported.

content.markdown: BitLocker 128-bit AES encryption. Encryption using customer-managed keys isn't supported.
content.text: BitLocker 128-bit AES encryption. Encryption using customer-managed keys isn't supported.
General-purpose V1, V2, and Blob storage accounts

content.markdown: General-purpose V1, V2, and Blob storage accounts
content.text: General-purpose V1, V2, and Blob storage accounts
Locally redundant storage, geo-redundant storage, read-access geo-redundant storage, and zone-redundant storage

content.markdown: Locally redundant storage, geo-redundant storage, read-access geo-redundant storage, and zone-redundant storage
content.text: Locally redundant storage, geo-redundant storage, read-access geo-redundant storage, and zone-redundant storage
Provide high performance and low latency storage. Only support page blobs in premium storage accounts.

content.markdown: Provide high performance and low latency storage. Only support page blobs in premium storage accounts.
content.text: Provide high performance and low latency storage. Only support page blobs in premium storage accounts.
Can be provisioned, but no performance limit or guarantee. Would not block using block blobs, append blobs, tables and queues in premium storage accounts.

content.markdown: Can be provisioned, but no performance limit or guarantee. Would not block using block blobs, append blobs, tables and queues in premium storage accounts.
content.text: Can be provisioned, but no performance limit or guarantee. Would not block using block blobs, append blobs, tables and queues in premium storage accounts.
Supported when you use version 1808 or later.

content.markdown: Supported when you use version 1808 or later.
content.text: Supported when you use version 1808 or later.
4.75 TB (100 MB x 50,000 blocks) for the 1802 update or newer version. 50,000 X 4 MB (approximately 195 GB) for previous versions.

content.markdown: 4.75 TB (100 MB x 50,000 blocks) for the 1802 update or newer version. 50,000 X 4 MB (approximately 195 GB) for previous versions.
content.text: 4.75 TB (100 MB x 50,000 blocks) for the 1802 update or newer version. 50,000 X 4 MB (approximately 195 GB) for previous versions.
Backup Azure unmanaged VM disks attached to a running VM supported

content.markdown: Backup Azure unmanaged VM disks attached to a running VM supported
content.text: Backup Azure unmanaged VM disks attached to a running VM supported
Premium and standard Azure page blobs supported

content.markdown: Premium and standard Azure page blobs supported
content.text: Premium and standard Azure page blobs supported
Charges are incurred for unique pages, whether they are in the blob or in the snapshot. Would not incur additional charges for snapshots associated with a blob until base blob being updated.

content.markdown: Charges are incurred for unique pages, whether they are in the blob or in the snapshot. Would not incur additional charges for snapshots associated with a blob until base blob being updated.
content.text: Charges are incurred for unique pages, whether they are in the blob or in the snapshot. Would not incur additional charges for snapshots associated with a blob until base blob being updated.
Charges are incurred for base blob and assiociated snapshots. Would incur additional charges for each individual snapshot.

content.markdown: Charges are incurred for base blob and assiociated snapshots. Would incur additional charges for each individual snapshot.
content.text: Charges are incurred for base blob and assiociated snapshots. Would incur additional charges for each individual snapshot.
Hot, cool, and archive storage tiers.

content.markdown: Hot, cool, and archive storage tiers.
content.text: Hot, cool, and archive storage tiers.
Table partition key and row key size

content.markdown: Table partition key and row key size
content.text: Table partition key and row key size
The max number of snapshots of one blob isn't limited.

content.markdown: The max number of snapshots of one blob isn't limited.
content.text: The max number of snapshots of one blob isn't limited.
The max number of snapshots of one blob is 1,000.

content.markdown: The max number of snapshots of one blob is 1,000.
content.text: The max number of snapshots of one blob is 1,000.
Firewall and virtual network rules for storage

content.markdown: Firewall and virtual network rules for storage
content.text: Firewall and virtual network rules for storage

content.markdown: There are also differences with storage metrics:
content.text: There are also differences with storage metrics:

content.markdown: There are also differences with storage metrics:
content.text: There are also differences with storage metrics:
The transaction data in storage metrics does not differentiate internal or external network bandwidth.

content.markdown: The transaction data in storage metrics does not differentiate internal or external network bandwidth.
content.text: The transaction data in storage metrics does not differentiate internal or external network bandwidth.
The transaction data in storage metrics does not include virtual machine access to the mounted disks.

content.markdown: The transaction data in storage metrics does not include virtual machine access to the mounted disks.
content.text: The transaction data in storage metrics does not include virtual machine access to the mounted disks.
